name: Shinoken Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shinoken Group Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate, general contractor, energy, and life care businesses in Japan and internationally. It designs, constructs, purchases, rents, manages, and sells apartments and condominiums; and offers debt guarantee services, as well as short-term insurance for owners and tenants of apartments and condominiums. The company is also involved in the retail sale of LP gas and electricity to apartments and condominiums; and owning and operating of care facilities. In addition, it operates Kids Life, a daycare service for children with disabilities. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
